rules.description: Force-delete without recovery is unconditionally forbidden
rules.message: Force-deleting secrets without recovery window is forbidden.

rules.description: Deleting production secrets requires a separate change management process
rules.message: Deleting production secrets is forbidden through this tool. Use your organization's change management process.

rules.description: Writing to production secrets requires human approval
rules.message: Production secret modification requires explicit human approval.

rules.description: Reading production secret values requires approval
rules.message: Reading production secret values requires approval — ensure audit trail.

rules.description: Secret rotation requires approval regardless of environment
rules.message: Secret rotation requires approval — dependent services may break.

rules.description: Commands that expose secret values require dry-run
rules.message: Commands exposing secret values require dry-run — verify output handling.

rules.description: Overwriting an existing secret requires dry-run
rules.message: Secret overwrite requires dry-run — ensure previous version is preserved.

rules.description: Listing secret names (not values) is safe
rules.message: Listing secret names is non-destructive — auto-approved.

rules.description: Exporting to local environment is low risk
